name: int4-mtp-bi0-surgattn-attrib
description: Attribution variant of int4_mtp_bi0_surgattn: the force-2D TRITON_ATTN patch is gated on forward type so the 2D force can be applied to the main-model forward only while the kernel gate picks the 3D split-KV path on the drafter MTP proposer forwards. Selected by SURGATTN_ARM (default = control_2d = shipped bi0). drafter_only_3d is byte-identical to control_2d by construction (temp=0 emits the target argmax regardless of drafter proposals) and recovers the drafter share of the surgattn 3D decode speedup; all_3d is surgattn-OFF, kept only as the attribution anchor.
